Expected: Both tests pass.


### Step 5: Commit

```bash
git add crates/corvia-kernel/src/agent_writer.rs crates/corvia-kernel/src/lib.rs
git commit -m "feat(m2): atomic write path with staging + embed + insert (D45 Part 4)"
```
